auth.signInSubtitle: Continue with Google to create or access your account.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Sign up as a student with your email. In production you can switch to Google-only if you prefer.
auth.devOnlyHint: Development mode: use any email that exists in the database. Seeded demo teacher:
auth.devSignInError: No user found for that email. Sign up first or use the seed teacher email.
auth.devBypassBanner: DEV AUTH BYPASS ACTIVE: Google login is disabled for local testing.
auth.signUpError: Could not create account. Try again.
auth.misconfigured: Google sign-in is not configured. Set AUTH_GOOGLE_ID and AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET (or use DEV_AUTH_BYPASS=true in local development).

booking.title: Book a lesson
booking.teacherBrowseSubtitle: Browse teachers and open a profile to schedule with them.
booking.checkoutSummary: Confirm and pay to secure your lesson slot.
booking.leadTimeError: Bookings must be made at least 48 hours in advance.
booking.leadTimeNotice: Only lesson slots at least 48 hours in advance are available for booking.
booking.manualOverrideHelp: Allows booking inside 48 hours when explicitly checked.
booking.manualOverrideReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this exception is needed...

placement.title: Level placement
placement.intro: CEFR-aligned placement covering grammar, vocabulary, reading, functional communication, and writing. You can retake from your dashboard.
placement.loadError: Could not load the placement activity.
placement.timeExpired: Time is up. Please restart the placement test.
placement.submitWhenReady: Submit now to calculate your placement.
placement.manualReviewNotice: Your placement is marked for teacher review due to mixed indicators. We will still suggest a starting level now and can adjust after review.

writingFeedback.writingTooShort: Your writing is too short. Expand your ideas with examples and reasons.
writingFeedback.prepositionRisk: Review common preposition usage in collocations.
writingFeedback.goodTaskCompletion: You addressed the task clearly and sufficiently.
writingFeedback.strongCoherence: Your writing shows good coherence with linking words.

learn.title: Learn
